rooms.title: Confluence Forum & AI Experience Gallery

composition.notes: Seating now has separate cushion, back, back-shell, armrest, pedestal, and base parts (no longer block-like); the generic exhibit pods were replaced with purpose-built vision and language demonstrations repositioned near the view axis for legibility. Canonical-camera legibility of the two exhibits and clearance from the Dais/kiosk have not yet been confirmed against regenerated evidence; narrow-viewport legibility is unverified.

materialsLighting.notes: Kiosk no longer clips to featureless white but sits near the upper exposure limit; seat materials now vary by part (upholstery/back-shell/armrest/pedestal) but are unreviewed on target display hardware; exhibit emissive accents still read brighter than their subordinate role warrants.

navigation.notes: Automated boundary traversal evidence is used for this gate.

performance.notes: CI software WebGL measured about 5.7-9.9 seconds against a 2-second target across multiple corrective passes; target lab hardware and warm room-to-room timing remain unmeasured.

followUp.nextStep: Measure cold load and warm Room 02 -> Room 01 traversal timing on the actual target lab desktop/connection; record the result here.

contentSafety.notes: Decorative wall imagery and the kiosk pseudo-interface still require content review.

knownLimitations: Composition: seating and exhibit geometry have been reworked across several corrective passes; canonical-camera legibility of the relocated exhibits still needs evidence confirmation, and target-display materials/lighting review remains open.

Target-machine performance has not been measured (CI software-render ready time has run 5.7-9.9s against a 2s target across multiple passes); no owner or date is assigned yet - see manualChecks.performance.followUp.
Content correctness review of the kiosk pseudo-interface and wall-art imagery remains open.
